scripts.build:prod: cd .. && PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m scraper.finalize_public_export --quiet && cd web && NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH=/auctions next build && node scripts/prepare-public-data.mjs
scripts.verify-build: node scripts/verify-build.mjs && node scripts/verify-auction-filters.mjs && node scripts/verify-lot-sections.mjs && node scripts/verify-search-ranking.mjs && node scripts/verify-card-layout.mjs && node scripts/verify-analytics.mjs
